mapper.sql: pep.employee_id as pe_id, pep.political, pep.joining_time, pep.nature, pep.formal_time, pep.post, pep.start_time, pep.end_time, pep.attribute1, pep.attribute2, pep.attribute3, pep.enabled_flag, pep.id, pep.create_time, pep.create_by, pep.update_time, pep.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.political as ${tAlias}_political, ${tAlias}.joining_time as ${tAlias}_joining_time, ${tAlias}.nature as ${tAlias}_nature, ${tAlias}.formal_time as ${tAlias}_formal_time, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_political (employee_id, political, joining_time, nature, formal_time, post, start_time, end_time, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{joiningTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_political set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, political = #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, joining_time = #{joiningTime,jdbcType=DATE}, nature = #{nature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, formal_time = #{formalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pep.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pep.nature) > 0 then pep.nature else null end as nature, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pep.political) > 0 then pep.political else null end as political, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pep.post) > 0 then pep.post else null end as post from pm_employee_political pep join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pep.employee_id where pep.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pep.nature,pep.political,pep.post ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.sql:
select
,
from pm_employee_political pep left join pm_employee_political_temp pept on pep.id = pept.header_id and pept.enabled_flag = 1 and pept.check_flag = 'D' and pept.instructions_flag = 'U'
